name: GCU Library
description: Prepared books and data packs from the Geoscientific Chaos Union.

entries.name: arcr
entries.title: arcr / gewgaw — The Micro-Game DSL Manual
entries.description: A tiny, sandboxed DSL for one-screen arcade micro-games small enough to fit in a QR code — written for (and by) language models. The gewgaw reference engine, an example-first cookbook, and the normative spec.

entries.name: elements-of-style
entries.title: The Elements of Style
entries.description: The classic concise guide to English usage and composition (1918, original Strunk edition).

entries.name: factbook
entries.title: CIA World Factbook
entries.description: Per-country reference data from the CIA World Factbook — population, area, GDP, capital, government, coordinates, and a background blurb for 254 countries and entities.
entries.attribution: US Central Intelligence Agency — public domain

entries.name: rtnw
entries.title: Ray Tracing: The Next Week
entries.attribution: Peter Shirley, Trevor David Black, Steve Hollasch

entries.name: rtow
entries.title: Ray Tracing in One Weekend
entries.attribution: Peter Shirley, Trevor David Black, Steve Hollasch

entries.name: rtrol
entries.title: Ray Tracing: The Rest of Your Life
entries.attribution: Peter Shirley, Trevor David Black, Steve Hollasch
